PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Detail-oriented CPA with 8+ years of experience in financial reporting, auditing, and tax preparation. 
Expertise in GAAP compliance, financial analysis, and budget management.

SKILLS
Financial Reporting, GAAP, Tax Preparation, Auditing, QuickBooks, SAP, Excel, Financial Analysis, 
Budget Management, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, General Ledger, Cost Accounting

EXPERIENCE

Senior Accountant | ABC Financial Services | 2019 - Present
- Prepare monthly financial statements and reports in compliance with GAAP standards
- Manage accounts payable and receivable processes for $50M+ in annual transactions
- Conduct internal audits and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
- Utilize QuickBooks and SAP for financial data management
- Reduced month-end closing time by 30% through process improvements

Staff Accountant | XYZ Corporation | 2015 - 2019
- Maintained general ledger and performed account reconciliations
- Prepared quarterly and annual tax returns for corporate clients
- Assisted with budget preparation and variance analysis
- Implemented cost accounting procedures that saved $200K annually

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Science in Accounting
State University | 2011 - 2015
GPA: 3.8/4.0

CERTIFICATIONS
- Certified Public Accountant (CPA) - 2016
- Certified Management Accountant (CMA) - 2018

PROJECTS

- Developed automated financial reporting dashboard using Excel VBA
